kata — keybindings

Global                        Detail                                 Forms                       
?         help                tab            next tab                ctrl+s         save or apply
q/ctrl+c  quit                shift+tab      prev tab                esc            cancel       
R         scope toggle (gated)enter          jump to referenced issuetab/shift+tab  change field 
                              esc/backspace  back                    ctrl+e         open editor  
Queue                         e              edit body               ctrl+u         clear prompt 
k/up    up                    c              new comment                                         
j/down  down                  p              set parent              Filters                     
pgup    page up               b              add blocker             /       search              
pgdown  page down             L              add link                s       cycle status filter 
g       first                 +              add label               f       filter (form)       
G       last                  -              remove label            c       clear filters       
enter   open detail           a              assign owner            ctrl+r  reset filter form   
space   expand/collapse       A              clear owner                                         
n       new issue (form)                                                                         
x       close                 Children                                                           
r       reopen                N      new child                                                   
                              ↑↓     move child cursor                                           
                              enter  open child                                                  

press ? to return
